explanations.9: This line flattens an array of text nodes into a single string by calling extractText on each item and joining them together with no spaces.
explanations.10: This checks if the node is a React element (an object with props) and if it has children inside, then recursively extracts text from those children.
explanations.18: useMemo tells React to only recalculate the structuredData object when the children prop actually changes, not on every render.
explanations.30: This tells the browser that the JSON inside is structured data for search engines (like Google), not regular JavaScript to execute.
